reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is not suitable for sleep (Primary). The presence of white furniture and surfaces, along with the lack of a flat surface for sleeping, makes this environment unsuitable for sleep. The white color scheme also contributes to a stark, clinical atmosphere that is not conducive to sleep.
